name: Two or more active memberships — 10% off each
notes: Discount value stored in basis points (1000 bps = 10%).

name: Three or more active memberships — 15% off cheapest
notes: Higher priority rule; overrides the 10% rule when three or more memberships are active.

name: Free first month — 2nd child same-month signup
notes: New member's first month is free when a 2nd (or more) sibling signs up during the same calendar month as an existing active membership. Discount value 10000 bps = 100% of first period.

name: Four or more active memberships — 20% off each
notes: Highest-tier sibling discount — activates for families with 4+ active memberships. Discount value 2000 bps = 20%. Higher priority than three-plus and two-plus rules.

name: Swimming siblings — 15% off each (swim only)
notes: Sport-scoped incentive — only counts active swim memberships toward the min_active threshold, and only discounts swim memberships. Runs in parallel with generic sibling rules for other sports.

name: Two active memberships — 15% off the cheapest
notes: Legacy promo — inactive as of 2026-01-01. Preserved for reporting comparisons.
